logicId.Wiki: Set the ID of the logic created by the script.

goalAction_CannotGetTarget.Wiki: Goal action when the target becomes unrecapturable

searchTargetLv1ForgetTime.Wiki: Search enemy Lv1 Target Time to forget.

searchTargetLv2ForgetTime.Wiki: Search enemy Lv2 time to forget the target.

BackHomeLife_OnHitEneWal.AltName: Back Home Time on Touching Enemy Wall
BackHomeLife_OnHitEneWal.Wiki: The life of the BackToHome goal when it touches an enemy wall that blocks the block

SightTargetForgetTime.Wiki: Time to forget the visual target.

idAttackCannotMove.Wiki: An action that automatically takes place when a destructible object stops it.

callHelp_CallActionId.Wiki: Action ID (EzStateAnimID) when calling a friend

isGuard_Act.Wiki: Whether to guard against actions (assumed when returning home, looking toward the target)

ear_soundcut_dist.Wiki: The distance to reduce the size of the sound source. You will not hear any sound below this distance.

nonBattleActLife.AltName: Non-Battle Act Duration when in Combat

BackHome_LookTargetTime.AltName: Retreat Home - Look for Target Time
BackHome_LookTargetTime.Wiki: When returning home: Time to look at the target [sec]

BackHome_LookTargetDist.AltName: Retreat Home - Look for Target Distance
BackHome_LookTargetDist.Wiki: When returning home: Distance to see the target [m]

SoundTargetForgetTime.Wiki: Time to forget the sound target.

callHelp_CallPeerId.Wiki: Companion group ID to call a companion

targetSys_DmgEffectRate.Wiki: Damage impact rate acquisition (target system evaluation information)

TeamAttackEffectivity.Wiki: A value for determining the number of simultaneous attacks in a team. Increasing the value reduces the number of people who can participate in the attack at the same time.

BackHome_GuardActId.AltName: Guard action ID when returning home
BackHome_GuardActId.Wiki: Action number to perform when looking at the target when returning home (intended for use in guarding, 0 disables)

disableDark.Wiki: Whether the alert vision_distance and battle start distance are not affected by the darkness

callHelp_CallValidMinDistTarget.AltName: Call Help - Valid Target Min Distance
callHelp_CallValidMinDistTarget.Wiki: If it is closer than this value, you cannot call a friend.

callHelp_CallValidRange.Wiki: Do not call if the companion is farther than this value.

callHelp_ForgetTimeByArrival.AltName: Call Help - Forget Time by Arrival

callHelp_MinWaitTime.Wiki: Minimum time for the first wait goal of the response goal [101 => 10.1sec]

callHelp_MaxWaitTime.Wiki: Maximum time for the first waiting goal of the response goal [101 => 10.1sec]

goalAction_ToCaution.Wiki: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to normal sound detection

callHelp_ReplyBehaviorType.Wiki: Action type to target position after response

disablePathMove.Wiki: Whether to move directly without following the path even if a path move command comes

skipArrivalVisibleCheck.Wiki: Do you want to skip the arrival judgment by the line of sight? When set to On, arrival judgment is performed even if the line of sight does not pass.

thinkAttr_doAdmirer.Wiki: Thinking attribute: When turned on, it plays a role of surrounding.

enableNaviFlg_Edge.Wiki: Can you pass through the node cliff? (def: 1)

enableNaviFlg_LargeSpace.Wiki: Can you pass through the node wide? (def: 1)

enableNaviFlg_Ladder.Wiki: Can you pass through the node ladder? (def: 0)

enableNaviFlg_Hole.Wiki: Can you go through the node hole? (def: 0)

enableNaviFlg_Door.Wiki: Can you pass through the node door? (def: 0)

enableNaviFlg_InSideWall.Wiki: Can you pass through the node in the wall? (def: 0)

enableNaviFlg_Lava.Wiki: Can you pass through the node lava? (def: 0)

enableNaviFlg_Edge_Ordinary.Wiki: Can you pass the node cliff under normal / alert conditions? (def: 1)

isUpdateBattleSight.Wiki: Do you want to overwrite the battle view?

goalAction_ToSearchLv1.Wiki: Goal action when target has reached search level 1

goalAction_ToSearchLv2.Wiki: Goal action when target has reached search level 1

cameraEmuLookHalfAngleH.AltName: Virtual Camera Horizontal Field of View

cameraEmuLookHalfAngleV.AltName: Virtual Camera Vertical Field of View

isCameraEmuLockAt.Wiki: Whether the virtual camera should point in the direction of the target.

initialHitResponseType.Wiki: How the NPC reacts to being hit w/o having spotted the player.

isUseBoostRiseMove.Wiki: Whether to use boost rising operation instead of system movement when jumping.

doUseSharedTarget.Wiki: Does this target accept shared target warnings from other entities?

eye_BackOffsetDist.Wiki: The viering angle starts at this distance behind the center of the character. In meters.

eye_BeginDist.Wiki: This distance is not recognized from the viewing angle position. In meters.

actTypeOnFailedPath.Wiki: The default action to take when the end point of an alternative path is reached or when a path search fails.

actTypeOnNonBtlFailedPath.Wiki: When there is no target, this is the action to take after changing the current location to the nest.

goalAction_ToCaution.Wiki: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to normal sound detection.

goalAction_ToCautionImportant.Wiki: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to detection of significant sound.

disableLocalSteering.Wiki: (Unused) Do you want to turn off local steering, which is the behavior of trying to move while avoiding other characters?

goalAction_ToCautionThreat.Wiki: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to detecting a threat sound

goalAction_MaxBackHomeAction.Wiki: Goal action: Entered a state where you'll go home no matter what.

MemoryTargetForgetTime.Wiki: Time to forget memory target. In seconds.

goalAction_BackHomeAction.AltName: Goal Action - Return home while fighting
goalAction_BackHomeAction.Wiki: Goal action: Entered the state of returning home while fighting

isSearchEnableReycast.Wiki: Whether enemy search visibility occlusion (raycast) is enabled.

isAlwaysEyeSightFromDmyPoly.AltName: Always Align Vision To Dummy Poly
isAlwaysEyeSightFromDmyPoly.Wiki: Whether to always use dummy poly as the standard for visibility (Dmy ID: 250

shareTargetType.Wiki: Sets the type of target to share to.

changeStateAction_ToNormal.Wiki: Action when transitioning to normal state.

GoalActionID.Wiki: ID for general AI behavior outside of combat (only valid when the script type is Operation).

shareTargetRecognitionLag.Wiki: Delay time between receiving a shared target and recognizing it. in seconds.

keepSharingTargetAfterDiedTime.Wiki: The time, in seconds, that target sharing processing will continue after the character dies after reaching maximum range. If set to 0, sharing will stop immediately after death even if the maximum range is not reached.

radar_power.Wiki: A performance value that compares the target's stealth performance to determine whether it can be detected by radar.

commonAttack_WeaponPlace.Wiki: General attack equipment location setting, depending on the number of AI_WEAPON_PLACE_, -1 if none

shareSearchPointTargetDist.Wiki: (Unused) The distance at which characters' searchability values are shared. In meters.

shareCombatPointTargetDist.Wiki: (Unused) The distance at which characters share their engagement values. In meters.

shareSearchPointRate.Wiki: The percentage of characters who share their targets.

shareCombatPointRate.Wiki: The percentage of characters who share their engagements.

radar_dist.Wiki: Radar search range. Radar detects through any object.

eye_VerticalMax.Wiki: Upper limit of visual perception altitude. In meters.

eye_VerticalMin.Wiki: Lower limit of visual perception altitude. In meters.

searchEye_VerticalMax.Wiki: Enemy visual recognition upper limit altitude. In meters.

searchEye_VerticalMin.Wiki: Enemy visual recognition lower limit altitude. In meters.

fixedCannonReleaseDistByHit.AltName: Fixed Turret Mode - Disable Distance When Hit
fixedCannonReleaseDistByHit.Wiki: Distance to disable fixed gun turret when hit. In meters.

shareSearchTargetDist.Wiki: Distance at which search targets are shared.

shareAttackTargetDist.Wiki: Distance at which attack targets are shared.

shareSearchTargetSpeed.Wiki: The upper limit for the ''distance for sharing search targets.'' The initial value is 0m, and the shared range expands over time. -1 is an invalid value, and immediately shares within the maximum range.

shareAttackTargetSpeed.Wiki: The upper limit for the ''distance for sharing attack targets.'' The initial value is 0m, and the shared range expands over time. -1 is an invalid value, and immediately shares within the maximum range.

Option.Name: Raise shield and walk toward target
Return to base (look at home position)
